title: Destination Canada Mobility Forum: Attend as a candidate - Canada.ca
content:
## Attend as a candidate
Immigration candidates are encouraged to participate in our events and
	activities, where they will learn more about working and living in Canada.
- What to expect from our activities
- How to register Destination Canada Education Destination Canada Mobility Forum
- Destination Canada Education
- Destination Canada Mobility Forum

## What to expect from our activities
Our activities will connect you with
- representatives from Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada, who will
		explain Canada’s immigration procedures
- representatives from Canada’s provinces and territories, cities and
		regions, as well as Francophone communities, who will share information about
		their regions, cities, communities and immigration programs
- people who will answer your questions about life in French in Canada
		(outside Quebec) and services offered to newcomers
- organizations that evaluate your educational credentials and run approved
		language tests for immigration to Canada
- employers who are looking to fill positions in Canada, in provinces and
		territories other than Quebec
You will also be able to attend conferences and workshops that will give you
	an overview of Canada.
Participation is free for all candidates, but the number of spots is limited.
	Follow these instructions to guarantee your participation.

### Destination Canada Education
Participation is free for all candidates, but the number of spots is limited.
	Be sure to register in time for the best chance of participating.
Registration is now closed.

### 21st edition of the Destination Canada Mobility Forum
Registration is now closed.
We encourage you to visit this page regularly for information on the next
	edition of the Destination Canada Mobility Forum.
